name: verify-claims
description: Verification gates across the experiment lifecycle — deterministic + cross-family: verify_claim (the brief's FACTS), audit_experiment --design (the design's LOGIC), the data layer (audit_data.py full-pool determinism + --data cross-family semantics, the DATA's sanity vs intent), and close (the result's EVIDENCE). facts→logic→data→evidence; the model-judged rungs are read by a foreign model family.
